localRating.rationale: Four own requirements, all under approachability: a standout opening (what/who, outstanding) is outweighed by three at minimum — the payoff is described not shown, no representative output gets a newcomer to a real result, and one statement misrepresents which commands work. The whole-set verdict holds the floor but no better.

factorRatings.rationale: The front door opens well (what QUALITY.md is and who it's for lands outstanding), but the README consistently tells rather than shows results: no produced output, no real-result-in-one-command demonstration, and a command-status claim that contradicts the CLI and the README itself. Three of four requirements at minimum bind the factor to minimum.

aggregateRating.rationale: Leaf target: aggregate equals local rating.
